data.title: Oracle Transforms Construction Safety Management with AI
data.description: A new predictive intelligence solution powered by AI has been introduced to aid organizations in preventing safety incidents, cutting down costs, and promoting a proactive safety environment. This innovative tool, Oracle Construction and Engineering Advisor, is now widely accessible following its announcement in Austin, Texas, on March 5, 2026. This solution offers valuable assistance to companies looking to enhance their safety practices and save resources through predictive insights.

data.title: VenHub Secures Agreements for Six New Autonomous Smart Store Locations Across Las Vegas
data.description: VenHub Global, Inc., a prominent player in the realm of fully autonomous Smart Store technology, disclosed that it has secured deals with various independent operators to establish six additional VenHub Smart Store outlets in the Las Vegas metropolitan region. This strategic move is aimed at bolstering the company’s footprint in the city, which serves as the nexus for its corporate headquarters and production facilities. The agreements signify a significant step forward in VenHub's expansion plans, marking a clear commitment to enhancing its market presence and customer reach in the region.

data.title: Solar company FTC reports financial results for Q4 2025.
data.description: A recent study reported a significant increase in global temperatures over the past decade, with an average rise of 1.2 degrees Celsius. The study analyzed temperature data from various regions around the world and highlighted the impact of climate change on this alarming trend. Additionally, the research showed a record-breaking number of natural disasters in 2020, totaling 416 events. These included wildfires, hurricanes, floods, and heatwaves, resulting in billions of dollars in damage and affecting millions of people. Experts warn that urgent action is needed to address the worsening climate crisis and mitigate its devastating effects.

data.title: Stack Capital Group Inc. Reports 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Stack Capital Group Inc. revealed its financial outcomes for the year concluding on December 31, 2025, in Toronto, Canada, on March 5, 2026. The company is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol TSX:STCK.

data.title: GFT Technologies Recognized as the Most Valuable Pioneer in QKS Group's AI Maturity Matrix™ for Digital Banking Transformation Services, 2026
data.description: QKS Group has recognized GFT Technologies as the Most Valuable Pioneer (MVP) due to its innovative AI-centric strategy for digital banking transformation. The company from PUNE, India was commended for its leadership in incorporating intelligence into core modernization and engineering delivery frameworks. This announcement was made on March 5, 2026.

data.title: Tradeweb Reports February 2026 Total Trading Volume of $61.8 Trillion and Average Daily Volume of $3.1 Trillion
data.description: In New York, Tradeweb Markets Inc. (Nasdaq: TW), a prominent player in electronic trading across various asset classes, disclosed a total trading volume of $61.8 trillion for February 2026. The average daily volume ("ADV") for the month stood at $3.1 trillion, reflecting a substantial 23.4% increase compared to the previous year. Some noteworthy achievements for the month included setting new records for ADV in fully electronic U.S. high-grade credit, global repurchase agreements, and other segments of the money market.

data.title: Suffolk Taps Industry Veteran Louis Martinelli to Scale Its Freedom Source Supply Chain Vertical and Reinforce Its Seamless Platform Delivery
data.description: Headquartered in Boston, Suffolk, a leading construction company, has appointed Louis Martinelli as the Head of Freedom Source. This direct-to-manufacturer procurement engine aims to enhance cost transparency and competitive pricing, boost supply reliability, and streamline the design-to-construction workflow for clients. Louis Martinelli will report to Pat Lucey, Suffolk Northeast and National Centers of Excellence President. This move is part of Suffolk's effort to innovate and improve its services.

data.title: Distribution Solutions Group Announces 2025 Full Year and Fourth Quarter Results
data.description: Fort Worth, Texas - Distribution Solutions Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: DSGR), a leading specialty distribution company, revealed its consolidated results for the fourth quarter ending on December 31, 2025. The report can be accessed alongside an earnings presentation on their website at https://investor.distributionsolutionsgroup.com/news/events. The disclosed data includes selected unaudited operational outcomes. For further details on the reconciliations of Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP) to non-GAAP measures, refer to the provided resources.
